expectations.text: The response invokes jira-update-flow.sh with --print-payload (or shows its output)
The preview shows the label operation as incremental ADD (not REPLACE ALL labels)
expectations.evidence: preview frames label change as 'ADD needs-review', not replace-all

expectations.text: The preview shows a warning about notifications being suppressed (--no-notify)
The response asks the user for confirmation before proceeding
expectations.evidence: response asks user to confirm before proceeding

expectations.text: The response does NOT call jira-update-flow.sh without --print-payload
Claude presents the payload preview and asks for confirmation
expectations.evidence: Turn 1 response shows payload preview and asks for y/n

expectations.text: After the user says 'n', Claude asks what the user wants to change (revision loop) rather than aborting
expectations.evidence: Turn 2 response asks 'What would you like to change?' rather than aborting

expectations.text: Claude does NOT respond with 'Aborted — no Jira write was made' when the user says 'n'
expectations.evidence: Turn 2 response does not contain an abort message

expectations.text: The response invites the user to continue iterating on the request
expectations.evidence: Turn 2 response invites further iteration on the update
